title: Integration of spatial single-cell proteomics and spatial metabolomics reveals tumor microenvironment predictive of immunotherapy response in mucosal melanoma.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Mucosal melanoma (MuM) is a rare but aggressive malignancy with limited benefit from immune checkpoint inhibition and few predictive biomarkers. We integrated single-cell spatial proteomics (COMET) and spatial metabolomics (MALDI-IMS) to profile 97 tissue cores from 26 patients treated with PD-1/PD-L1 and/or CTLA-4 inhibitors. We profiled 695,444 cells and....
